SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-08-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO FEB-14-2024 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY STEVEN ADELSON (SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER). PLAINTIFF INDICATES PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMENT OUTSIDE OF COURT. A PROGRESS REPORT HEARING IS SET 90 DAYS OUT AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR 2/14/24 AT 3:30 P.M. IN DEPT. 506. PARTIES MUST APPEAR IF PAYMENTS ARE NOT BEING MADE OR IF PARTIES WISH TO REQUEST THE SETTING OF A FURTHER PROGRESS REPORT HEARING. IF THERE ARE NO APPEARANCES BY PARTIES ON 2/14/24, THE COURT WILL DISMISS PLAINTIFF'S CASE WITH PREJUDICE PER THE PARTIES' SETTLEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH; CLERK: S. KANE. NOT REPORTED. (D. 506)
